name: andon
description: Evidence-grounded harden-and-advance loop for live, actively-maintained codebases: propose maximally from the code/artifacts/best-practice, verify adversarially against evidence rather than authority across seven proof strategies chosen by wire type, and advance only past a proven wire (the andon rule) — never past a broken or unproven one. Composable skill family (preflight, propose, verify, loop, status) over a native OKF ledger, read-only except a scoped output directory.
